productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Formal Shoe
description: Take formal dressing to the next level with these leather shoes from red tape. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for those who never compromise on quality. Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Rounded and padded collar for in-step comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather inner lining for breathable comfort Padded fabric footbed for comfortable all-day wear Outsole Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional and partly textured lugs in the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and traction Mildly raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for backfoot protection Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
